query: How do I reset my two-factor authentication if I've lost access to my authenticator app?

chunks.text:
[Home](https://deriv.com/)![Image 26](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/6675269a479ef100e7b816ff_divider.svg)[Help centre](https://deriv.com/help-centre)![Image 27](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/6675269a479ef100e7b816ff_divider.svg)

Security

Thank you! Your submission has been received!

Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.

# Security

## I lost my phone. How can I disable two-factor authentication (2FA)?

![Image 28](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/security/#) immediately, and we'll help to disable 2FA on your account. When you have a new phone, please [re-enable 2FA](https://deriv.com/account/two-factor-authentication?_gl=1*ijdki0*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..).

## How can I identify Deriv customer support impersonators on Telegram?

*   You’re below 18 years old.
*   You may already have a Deriv account.
*   Our services aren't available in your country of residence.

You may refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more information. If you need help getting into your account, [contact us via live chat.](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#)

‍

## I forgot my Google/Facebook/Apple account password. How can I log in to my Deriv account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you created your Deriv account using Apple/Google/Facebook, try resetting your Apple/Google/Facebook password. After that, you should be able to log in to Deriv as usual.

If you'd like to log in using your email address instead, follow these steps:

*   Hit [Forgot password?](https://deriv.com/reset-password) on the [login page.](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929)
*   Enter the email address you use for your Apple/Google/Facebook account.
*   We'll email you a verification link. Click that link and set a new password for your Deriv account.
*   Now, you'll be able to log in to your Deriv account using your email address and password.

## How can I close my account?

You may reactivate your account by [logging in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) with your email address and password. If you're unable to do so, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you further.

## Is there any system/website maintenance going on?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check our [Status page](https://deriv.statuspage.io/) to see if there is any system or website maintenance going on.

‍

1.   Please log in to your account and go to the “Manage account settings”.
2.   On the left side panel, under the “Security & Safety” category, choose “Email and passwords”, or you may click [here](https://deriv.com/account/passwords?_ga=2.213552532.144519041.1664156028-1088792513.1649824728).
3.   Once you click “Change email”, a verification link is sent to your current email address.
4.   Upon verifying the link in the email, the system will direct you to a pop-up for you to insert the new email address.
5.   Then, you may follow the instructions to change the email address.

Don't worry, if you encounter any issues along the process, please reach out to our support through [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) for further assistance.

‍

**Note:** If you have lost access to your registered email address, we won’t be able to change it on our end. Contact your email service provider for assistance in regaining access to your email. Once you have regained access to it, follow the steps above to change your email address on Deriv.

## Why can't I create an account?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some possible reasons you aren't able to create an account:

![Image 31](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We’ll prompt you to verify your account when it’s needed.

‍

## How do I verify my account?

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

When we prompt you to verify your account, follow these steps:

*   [Log in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) to your Deriv account.
*   Go to [Settings](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details)>**Proof of identity** or **Proof of address**.
*   Follow the instructions on the screen to verify your account.

**Note:** The **Proof of identity** and **Proof of address** pages will not be available if your account doesn’t need verification at this time.

## What documents do I need to verify my account?

![Image 33](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You’ll need the following documents to verify your account:

*   **Proof of identity**

You’ll need a valid government-issued identity document such as a national ID card, passport, or driver's licence. Your document must clearly show your name, photo, and date of birth.

query: What is the minimum withdrawal amount for bank transfer?

chunks.text:
![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use any wallet to make the deposit as long as the wallet supports the network we are using.

‍

## What is the minimum deposit and withdrawal for cryptocurrency?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

There is no minimum deposit for cryptocurrency. The minimum withdrawal is not fixed, so please check for the amount on the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page.

## Can I transfer the funds in my account to another person's account?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. Fund transfers can only be made within your own accounts.

‍

The currency conversion for your deposits and withdrawals are done by your payment service provider. For example, if you use Skrill, your transaction amount will be converted by Skrill. Please check with your service provider regarding the conversion rates used for your deposits and withdrawals.

## How can I cancel my withdrawal?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To cancel your withdrawal, follow these steps:

1.   Go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal).
2.   We'll send you an email with a verification link. Click that link.
3.   You’ll be brought back to the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page. Click **Review pending** and select the transaction that you'd like to cancel.
4.   Click **Yes** to confirm the cancellation. Your funds will be returned to your Deriv account, and your account balance will be updated.

**Note**: You cannot cancel withdrawals if your withdrawal request has already been authorised and processed.

## Can I deposit with my friend's/family member's debit/credit card or e-wallet?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Title: Deposits and Withdrawals | Help Centre

URL Source: https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/

Published Time: Mon, 27 Apr 2026 10:13:04 GMT

Markdown Content:
## What payment methods can I use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use debit and credit cards, e-wallets, cryptocurrency wallets, Deriv P2P, online banking, and fiat onramp for deposits and withdrawals (see our [Payment methods page](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) for a detailed list).

Once you log in to your Deriv account, you’ll be able to see payment methods available in your country when you [manage your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/).

## How long does it take for my deposits and withdrawals to be processed?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We process your deposits and withdrawals internally within 24 hours (depending on your payment method and internal checks). It may take longer for your funds to reach you due to the different processing times by banks and payment service providers. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of the processing times for each payment method.

## What is the minimum deposit or withdrawal amount?

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The minimum deposit and withdrawal amount varies depending on the payment method. The lowest deposit and withdrawal amount is 5 to 10 USD/EUR/GBP/AUD via e-wallets. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of payment methods and their minimum deposit and withdrawal amounts.

## My withdrawal verification link has expired. What should I do?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be sure to check the spam or junk section of your email if you do not receive the link in your inbox.

To request a new link, go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) and click **Verify my request**. We’ll email you a new link, so please use it within 1 hour.

## How can I remove the withdrawal limit on my account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We'll remove the 10,000 USD withdrawal limit once your account has been verified.

## Why did my credit card deposit get declined?

![Image 6](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some reasons why your credit card deposit was declined:

1.   CVV failure. Please contact your bank to check.
2.   Deposit limit, please try again after 1 - 2 hours to make a deposit.
3.   SCA failure. Please contact your bank to check.
4.   RCS reject, allowed number of cards exceeded. Please contact your bank to check.

If you need help, please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/#).

## Can I withdraw my deposit bonus?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes, but only once your turnover exceeds an amount that's 25 times the deposit bonus value. The bonus is to help you get familiar with our trading platforms, so we'd love for you to use it to trade and earn a potential profit (which you may withdraw at any time).

‍

## What conversion rates do you use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

query: Can I have more than one real account on Deriv?

chunks.text:
:

*   **Notify Deriv:**Contact our Customer Support team via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/fraud-prevention/#). Please have the scammer account’s information and evidence/screenshots ready so we can take appropriate action as soon as possible. Depending on the severity of the situation, we may temporarily freeze or close your account to prevent further unauthorised transactions.
*   **Change your Deriv password:** Change the password for your account immediately. Use a strong, unique password, which can be generated with password management tools. If you use this same password for other accounts, make sure you change those, too.**‍**
*   **Monitor your accounts:**Keep a close eye on your accounts for any suspicious activity. This includes checking for unauthorised transactions, changes to account settings, or new login attempts.

## What are the official social media accounts of Deriv?

![Image 21](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Our social media profiles are at the bottom of our website and emails. Deriv has only one official account per social media platform.

- Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/derivdotcom](https://www.facebook.com/derivdotcom)

- Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/deriv_official/](https://www.instagram.com/deriv_official/)

- Twitter/X: [https://twitter.com/derivdotcom/](https://twitter.com/derivdotcom/)

*   Then, withdraw your funds.
    *   For your Deriv real account, go to [your funds](https://app.deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) to withdraw your balance.
    *   For your Deriv MT5 and Deriv cTrader real accounts, [transfer your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/account-transfer?_gl=1*1bvctlk*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..) to your Deriv real account first.

*   [Contact us via live chat,](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) and we’ll help you change the currency of your account.

‍

## Can I change my email address?

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes, you can change your email address with us. Also, you can make the changes on your own if you still have access to your current email address.

Kindly follow the steps:

*   You’re below 18 years old.
*   You may already have a Deriv account.
*   Our services aren't available in your country of residence.

You may refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more information. If you need help getting into your account, [contact us via live chat.](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#)

‍

## I forgot my Google/Facebook/Apple account password. How can I log in to my Deriv account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you created your Deriv account using Apple/Google/Facebook, try resetting your Apple/Google/Facebook password. After that, you should be able to log in to Deriv as usual.

If you'd like to log in using your email address instead, follow these steps:

*   Hit [Forgot password?](https://deriv.com/reset-password) on the [login page.](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929)
*   Enter the email address you use for your Apple/Google/Facebook account.
*   We'll email you a verification link. Click that link and set a new password for your Deriv account.
*   Now, you'll be able to log in to your Deriv account using your email address and password.

## How can I close my account?

1.   Please log in to your account and go to the “Manage account settings”.
2.   On the left side panel, under the “Security & Safety” category, choose “Email and passwords”, or you may click [here](https://deriv.com/account/passwords?_ga=2.213552532.144519041.1664156028-1088792513.1649824728).
3.   Once you click “Change email”, a verification link is sent to your current email address.
4.   Upon verifying the link in the email, the system will direct you to a pop-up for you to insert the new email address.
5.   Then, you may follow the instructions to change the email address.

Don't worry, if you encounter any issues along the process, please reach out to our support through [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) for further assistance.

‍

**Note:** If you have lost access to your registered email address, we won’t be able to change it on our end. Contact your email service provider for assistance in regaining access to your email. Once you have regained access to it, follow the steps above to change your email address on Deriv.

## Why can't I create an account?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some possible reasons you aren't able to create an account:

You may reactivate your account by [logging in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) with your email address and password. If you're unable to do so, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you further.

## Is there any system/website maintenance going on?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check our [Status page](https://deriv.statuspage.io/) to see if there is any system or website maintenance going on.

‍

Published Time: Mon, 27 Apr 2026 10:13:04 GMT

Markdown Content:
## What payment methods can I use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use debit and credit cards, e-wallets, cryptocurrency wallets, Deriv P2P, online banking, and fiat onramp for deposits and withdrawals (see our [Payment methods page](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) for a detailed list).

Once you log in to your Deriv account, you’ll be able to see payment methods available in your country when you [manage your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/).

## How long does it take for my deposits and withdrawals to be processed?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We process your deposits and withdrawals internally within 24 hours (depending on your payment method and internal checks). It may take longer for your funds to reach you due to the different processing times by banks and payment service providers. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of the processing times for each payment method.

## What is the minimum deposit or withdrawal amount?

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The minimum deposit and withdrawal amount varies depending on the payment method. The lowest deposit and withdrawal amount is 5 to 10 USD/EUR/GBP/AUD via e-wallets. ## My withdrawal verification link has expired. What should I do?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be sure to check the spam or junk section of your email if you do not receive the link in your inbox.

To request a new link, go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) and click **Verify my request**. We’ll email you a new link, so please use it within 1 hour.

## How can I remove the withdrawal limit on my account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We'll remove the 10,000 USD withdrawal limit once your account has been verified.

## Why did my credit card deposit get declined?

No, you must verify your account before trading.

If you have a non-EU account:

Yes, as long as you haven’t been prompted to verify your account with us.

‍

## How long does verification take?

![Image 36](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We try to review your verification documents within the same day. In some cases, due to high traffic, it may take up to 3 business days. You’ll get a confirmation email from us once the review is complete. You can also check the status of your documents through:

[Settings > Proof of identity](https://deriv.com/account/proof-of-identity)

[Settings > Proof of address](https://deriv.com/account/proof-of-address)

‍

## Why were my documents declined?

![Image 37](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We may have declined your documents because they were unclear, invalid, expired, had cropped edges, or showed details that did not match your Deriv profile. If you need help, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/verification/#).

‍

Sorry, we couldn’t find any results with “

Empty state

” in it.

## Still need help?

The currency conversion for your deposits and withdrawals are done by your payment service provider. For example, if you use Skrill, your transaction amount will be converted by Skrill. Please check with your service provider regarding the conversion rates used for your deposits and withdrawals.

## How can I cancel my withdrawal?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To cancel your withdrawal, follow these steps:

1.   Go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal).
2.   We'll send you an email with a verification link. Click that link.
3.   You’ll be brought back to the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page. Click **Review pending** and select the transaction that you'd like to cancel.
4.   Click **Yes** to confirm the cancellation. Your funds will be returned to your Deriv account, and your account balance will be updated.

**Note**: You cannot cancel withdrawals if your withdrawal request has already been authorised and processed.

## Can I deposit with my friend's/family member's debit/credit card or e-wallet?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

![Image 6](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some reasons why your credit card deposit was declined:

1.   CVV failure. Please contact your bank to check.
2.   Deposit limit, please try again after 1 - 2 hours to make a deposit.
3.   SCA failure. Please contact your bank to check.
4.   RCS reject, allowed number of cards exceeded. Please contact your bank to check.

If you need help, please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/#).

## Can I withdraw my deposit bonus?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes, but only once your turnover exceeds an amount that's 25 times the deposit bonus value. The bonus is to help you get familiar with our trading platforms, so we'd love for you to use it to trade and earn a potential profit (which you may withdraw at any time).

‍

## What conversion rates do you use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

query: What happens to my open positions if I close my account?

chunks.text:
![Image 6](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Before closing your account, please ensure to close all your open positions and withdraw all the funds in your account.

Then, [click here to close your account](https://deriv.com/account/deactivate-account).

If you have questions or need help, please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#).

## How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can unsubscribe by going to the [Personal details](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details) page. Uncheck the checkbox that says "Get updates about Deriv products, services and events." at the bottom of the page, and click **Submit.**

## What is a dormant fee?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

It's a fee that we charge for accounts that have been inactive for the last 12 months. Refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more info.

## Can I open a corporate or business account?

You may reactivate your account by [logging in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) with your email address and password. If you're unable to do so, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you further.

## Is there any system/website maintenance going on?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check our [Status page](https://deriv.statuspage.io/) to see if there is any system or website maintenance going on.

‍

1.   Please log in to your account and go to the “Manage account settings”.
2.   On the left side panel, under the “Security & Safety” category, choose “Email and passwords”, or you may click [here](https://deriv.com/account/passwords?_ga=2.213552532.144519041.1664156028-1088792513.1649824728).
3.   Once you click “Change email”, a verification link is sent to your current email address.
4.   Upon verifying the link in the email, the system will direct you to a pop-up for you to insert the new email address.
5.   Then, you may follow the instructions to change the email address.

Don't worry, if you encounter any issues along the process, please reach out to our support through [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) for further assistance.

‍

**Note:** If you have lost access to your registered email address, we won’t be able to change it on our end. Contact your email service provider for assistance in regaining access to your email. Once you have regained access to it, follow the steps above to change your email address on Deriv.

## Why can't I create an account?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some possible reasons you aren't able to create an account:

‍
*   **Proof of address**Your document must be issued within the last 12 months. Some regions may require more recent documents, such as within 3 or 6 months. It must contain your name, address, the name of the company that issued the document, and the issue date.

Accepted proof of address documents include:
    *   Utility bill
    *   Bank statement
    *   Municipal and property tax bill
    *   Telephone (landline) bill and/or home internet package (landline)
    *   Official residence declaration or Affidavit
    *   Official letters issued by the government, solicitor, or an independent source
    *   Rental or tenancy agreement

## Why do I need to verify my account?

![Image 34](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Our regulators require us to verify your account in accordance with anti-money laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) laws. If we have prompted you to upload your documents to verify your account, you'll only be able to continue using our services after your account is verified.

For further information, please check our [Terms and conditions](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf).

‍

## Can I trade without verifying my account?

![Image 35](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you have an EU account:

Check the account’s activity: misspelling of the account name, a high following-to-follow ratio, and emoji-loaded offers that sound too good to be true are red flags. We never ask for personal or bank details through social media or do giveaways or promotions. Verify the account with our official social media accounts listed at the bottom of our website.

## What phishing resources does Deriv have?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please visit our [blog](https://deriv.com/blog/posts/identify-report-phishing-scams) and [secure and responsible trading page](https://deriv.com/responsible/) for more tips on protecting yourself online.

## Will Deriv compensate for my loss if my account falls under a scamming/phishing trap?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No, your account safety is your sole responsibility. Please visit our [blog](https://blog.deriv.com/posts/identify-report-phishing-scams/?_gl=1*uwqf8f*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..) to learn safety tips on identifying and reporting phishing attempts.

query: Is there a fee for depositing via cryptocurrency?

chunks.text:
![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use any wallet to make the deposit as long as the wallet supports the network we are using.

‍

## What is the minimum deposit and withdrawal for cryptocurrency?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

There is no minimum deposit for cryptocurrency. The minimum withdrawal is not fixed, so please check for the amount on the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page.

## Can I transfer the funds in my account to another person's account?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. Fund transfers can only be made within your own accounts.

‍

No. To keep your funds safe, you are strictly prohibited from using payment methods that are not yours. If you do use someone else’s payment method, we’ll suspend your Deriv account for security purposes.

## Why can't I see any payment methods on the Withdrawal page?

![Image 11](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Your payment method will only appear on the Withdrawal page after you've made your first deposit. If you've made a deposit and still don't see your payment method on the Withdrawal screen, it's probably because the payment method you used for the deposit cannot be used for withdrawals. In this case, you may need to use a different payment method that supports withdrawals, too. [Contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/#) if you need help.

‍

## Can I use the same address to make a cryptocurrency deposit?

![Image 12](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please generate an address on the cryptocurrency deposit page whenever you want to make a deposit. Always use a freshly generated address to ensure accuracy.

‍

## Can I use my Binance wallet to make the cryptocurrency deposit?

Title: Deposits and Withdrawals | Help Centre

URL Source: https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/

Published Time: Mon, 27 Apr 2026 10:13:04 GMT

Markdown Content:
## What payment methods can I use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use debit and credit cards, e-wallets, cryptocurrency wallets, Deriv P2P, online banking, and fiat onramp for deposits and withdrawals (see our [Payment methods page](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) for a detailed list).

Once you log in to your Deriv account, you’ll be able to see payment methods available in your country when you [manage your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/).

## How long does it take for my deposits and withdrawals to be processed?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We process your deposits and withdrawals internally within 24 hours (depending on your payment method and internal checks). It may take longer for your funds to reach you due to the different processing times by banks and payment service providers. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of the processing times for each payment method.

## What is the minimum deposit or withdrawal amount?

*   the Malta Financial Services Authority
*   the Labuan Financial Services Authority
*   the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission
*   the British Virgin Islands Financial Services Commission
*   the Mauritius Financial Services Commission

You can get more info about this on our [Regulatory information](https://deriv.com/regulatory/) page.

## Where is my money held?

![Image 25](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Your money is held in secure financial institutions and is always available to you should you wish to withdraw. We don't use your money for our business purposes.

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The minimum deposit and withdrawal amount varies depending on the payment method. The lowest deposit and withdrawal amount is 5 to 10 USD/EUR/GBP/AUD via e-wallets. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of payment methods and their minimum deposit and withdrawal amounts.

## My withdrawal verification link has expired. What should I do?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be sure to check the spam or junk section of your email if you do not receive the link in your inbox.

To request a new link, go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) and click **Verify my request**. We’ll email you a new link, so please use it within 1 hour.

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We'll remove the 10,000 USD withdrawal limit once your account has been verified.

## What assets are available for trading on weekends?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

## What are multipliers?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Deriv [multipliers](https://deriv.com/trade/options) combine the upside of leverage trading without the downside of losing more than your stake. This means that when the market moves in your favour, you'll multiply your potential profits. If the market moves against your prediction, your losses are limited only to your stake. To find out more, visit the [Options](https://deriv.com/trade/options) page.

Accepted proof of address documents include:
    *   Utility bill

Our regulators require us to verify your account in accordance with anti-money laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) laws. If we have prompted you to upload your documents to verify your account, you'll only be able to continue using our services after your account is verified.

For further information, please check our [Terms and conditions](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf).

## Can I trade without verifying my account?

## How long does verification take?

We try to review your verification documents within the same day. In some cases, due to high traffic, it may take up to 3 business days. You’ll get a confirmation email from us once the review is complete. You can also check the status of your documents through:

[Settings > Proof of identity](https://deriv.com/account/proof-of-identity)

‍

## Why were my documents declined?

We may have declined your documents because they were unclear, invalid, expired, had cropped edges, or showed details that did not match your Deriv profile. If you need help, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/verification/#).

Empty state

” in it.

## Still need help?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes. [Contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you through it. We'll need the following information:

*   Name of entity
*   Certificate of incorporation
*   Memorandum and articles of association
*   List of directors
*   List of shareholders
*   Authorisation to manage the account (if your business has more than one director)
*   Passport and utility bill/bank statement of the person managing the account and of each director and shareholder (if your business has more than 1)
*   Utility bill/bank statement containing the address of the business
*   Source of wealth documentation

We may request more information during the signup process.

## Do I need to pay taxes on my trades/profits?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

It depends on the laws in your country of residence. Please get professional advice on whether you're required to pay taxes on [your profits](https://deriv.com/reports/profit).

We’ll prompt you to verify your account when it’s needed.

## How do I verify my account?

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

When we prompt you to verify your account, follow these steps:

*   [Log in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) to your Deriv account.
*   Go to [Settings](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details)>**Proof of identity** or **Proof of address**.
*   Follow the instructions on the screen to verify your account.

**Note:** The **Proof of identity** and **Proof of address** pages will not be available if your account doesn’t need verification at this time.

## What documents do I need to verify my account?

![Image 33](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You’ll need the following documents to verify your account:

*   **Proof of identity**

You’ll need a valid government-issued identity document such as a national ID card, passport, or driver's licence. Your document must clearly show your name, photo, and date of birth.

query: How do I reset my two-factor authentication if I've lost access to my authenticator app?

chunks.text:
[Home](https://deriv.com/)![Image 26](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/6675269a479ef100e7b816ff_divider.svg)[Help centre](https://deriv.com/help-centre)![Image 27](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/6675269a479ef100e7b816ff_divider.svg)

Security

Thank you! Your submission has been received!

Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.

# Security

## I lost my phone. How can I disable two-factor authentication (2FA)?

![Image 28](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/security/#) immediately, and we'll help to disable 2FA on your account. When you have a new phone, please [re-enable 2FA](https://deriv.com/account/two-factor-authentication?_gl=1*ijdki0*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..).

## How can I identify Deriv customer support impersonators on Telegram?

*   You’re below 18 years old.
*   You may already have a Deriv account.
*   Our services aren't available in your country of residence.

You may refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more information. If you need help getting into your account, [contact us via live chat.](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#)

‍

## I forgot my Google/Facebook/Apple account password. How can I log in to my Deriv account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you created your Deriv account using Apple/Google/Facebook, try resetting your Apple/Google/Facebook password. After that, you should be able to log in to Deriv as usual.

If you'd like to log in using your email address instead, follow these steps:

*   Hit [Forgot password?](https://deriv.com/reset-password) on the [login page.](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929)
*   Enter the email address you use for your Apple/Google/Facebook account.
*   We'll email you a verification link. Click that link and set a new password for your Deriv account.
*   Now, you'll be able to log in to your Deriv account using your email address and password.

## How can I close my account?

You may reactivate your account by [logging in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) with your email address and password. If you're unable to do so, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you further.

## Is there any system/website maintenance going on?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check our [Status page](https://deriv.statuspage.io/) to see if there is any system or website maintenance going on.

‍

1.   Please log in to your account and go to the “Manage account settings”.
2.   On the left side panel, under the “Security & Safety” category, choose “Email and passwords”, or you may click [here](https://deriv.com/account/passwords?_ga=2.213552532.144519041.1664156028-1088792513.1649824728).
3.   Once you click “Change email”, a verification link is sent to your current email address.
4.   Upon verifying the link in the email, the system will direct you to a pop-up for you to insert the new email address.
5.   Then, you may follow the instructions to change the email address.

Don't worry, if you encounter any issues along the process, please reach out to our support through [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) for further assistance.

‍

**Note:** If you have lost access to your registered email address, we won’t be able to change it on our end. Contact your email service provider for assistance in regaining access to your email. Once you have regained access to it, follow the steps above to change your email address on Deriv.

## Why can't I create an account?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some possible reasons you aren't able to create an account:

![Image 31](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We’ll prompt you to verify your account when it’s needed.

‍

## How do I verify my account?

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

When we prompt you to verify your account, follow these steps:

*   [Log in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) to your Deriv account.
*   Go to [Settings](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details)>**Proof of identity** or **Proof of address**.
*   Follow the instructions on the screen to verify your account.

**Note:** The **Proof of identity** and **Proof of address** pages will not be available if your account doesn’t need verification at this time.

## What documents do I need to verify my account?

![Image 33](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You’ll need the following documents to verify your account:

*   **Proof of identity**

You’ll need a valid government-issued identity document such as a national ID card, passport, or driver's licence. Your document must clearly show your name, photo, and date of birth.

query: "What is the minimum withdrawal amount for a bank transfer?"

chunks.text:
![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use any wallet to make the deposit as long as the wallet supports the network we are using.

‍

## What is the minimum deposit and withdrawal for cryptocurrency?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

There is no minimum deposit for cryptocurrency. The minimum withdrawal is not fixed, so please check for the amount on the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page.

## Can I transfer the funds in my account to another person's account?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. Fund transfers can only be made within your own accounts.

‍

The currency conversion for your deposits and withdrawals are done by your payment service provider. For example, if you use Skrill, your transaction amount will be converted by Skrill. Please check with your service provider regarding the conversion rates used for your deposits and withdrawals.

## How can I cancel my withdrawal?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To cancel your withdrawal, follow these steps:

1.   Go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal).
2.   We'll send you an email with a verification link. Click that link.
3.   You’ll be brought back to the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page. Click **Review pending** and select the transaction that you'd like to cancel.
4.   Click **Yes** to confirm the cancellation. Your funds will be returned to your Deriv account, and your account balance will be updated.

**Note**: You cannot cancel withdrawals if your withdrawal request has already been authorised and processed.

## Can I deposit with my friend's/family member's debit/credit card or e-wallet?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The minimum deposit and withdrawal amount varies depending on the payment method. The lowest deposit and withdrawal amount is 5 to 10 USD/EUR/GBP/AUD via e-wallets. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of payment methods and their minimum deposit and withdrawal amounts.

## My withdrawal verification link has expired. What should I do?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be sure to check the spam or junk section of your email if you do not receive the link in your inbox.

To request a new link, go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) and click **Verify my request**. We’ll email you a new link, so please use it within 1 hour.

## How can I remove the withdrawal limit on my account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We'll remove the 10,000 USD withdrawal limit once your account has been verified.

## Why did my credit card deposit get declined?

Title: Deposits and Withdrawals | Help Centre

URL Source: https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/

Published Time: Mon, 27 Apr 2026 10:13:04 GMT

Markdown Content:
## What payment methods can I use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use debit and credit cards, e-wallets, cryptocurrency wallets, Deriv P2P, online banking, and fiat onramp for deposits and withdrawals (see our [Payment methods page](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) for a detailed list).

Once you log in to your Deriv account, you’ll be able to see payment methods available in your country when you [manage your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/).

## How long does it take for my deposits and withdrawals to be processed?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We process your deposits and withdrawals internally within 24 hours (depending on your payment method and internal checks). It may take longer for your funds to reach you due to the different processing times by banks and payment service providers. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of the processing times for each payment method.

## What is the minimum deposit or withdrawal amount?

*   the Malta Financial Services Authority
*   the Labuan Financial Services Authority
*   the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission
*   the British Virgin Islands Financial Services Commission
*   the Mauritius Financial Services Commission

You can get more info about this on our [Regulatory information](https://deriv.com/regulatory/) page.

## Where is my money held?

![Image 25](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Your money is held in secure financial institutions and is always available to you should you wish to withdraw. We don't use your money for our business purposes.
